title: Pelagic continuing knowledge curation; fresh grounding in progress
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b continuing owner-directed knowledge-surface curation. Skills loaded: oak-start-right-team, oak-consolidate-docs, oak-napkin. Boundary before claim: rechecking live claims, queue, git, plans, and fitness; preserving/routing knowledge first; no archive-as-tactic, no staging, no commit lane.
